headline: BMO Capital Raises Prologis (PLD) Price Target to $162 on Exposure to Data Center Demand
summary: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE:PLD) is one of the 10 Best Industrial Stocks Benefiting from the Data Center Boom. According to a report by TheFly on May 8, BMO Capital raised the price target on Prologis to $162 from $137 and upgraded the stock’s rating to Outperform from Market Perform, as it cited the company’s exposure to data […]
